page_content:
Important Notes: General Education

Courses

• Must be selected from the courses coded as meeting General Education requirements. See list of approved General Education courses at Testudo (https://app.testudo.umd.edu/soc/gen-ed/). Click on the General Education list for the term you wish to explore.

• May also be used to satisfy college, major, and/or supporting area requirements

• May not be taken on a Pass-Fail basis.

For information about general education requirements prior to the 2012-2013 academic year please email gened@umd.edu.

General Education
